{{Infobox artifact
| name = Seijan
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Seijan is a specific weapon identified as the tenth [[Fang]], which was created by the founder of a particular [[House]]. It is characterized by a short blade that features black spots resembling ink blots. The weapon is described as being roughly half the size of [[Azura]] while maintaining a similar shape.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Seijan]] is the tenth [[Dragon's Fang]] forged by the founder of [[Andra]]'s [[House]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|One of the children brought by [[Andra]] will carry [[Seijan]] into the world.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Seijan]] is the tenth [[Fang]] and has a blade marred by black spots.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Seijan]] is a [[sword]] used by [[Andra]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Seijan]] is a short blade speckled with ink.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Seijan]] is a [[Dragon's Fang]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"You have the honor to possess, ahhh, Seijan, the tenth Fang forged by the founder of our House."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
